title: phedimus uniflorus
intro: Phedimus uniflorus, also known as the rock jasmine or one-flowered sedum, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phedimus uniflorus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to utilize its medicinal properties.
